description: Crafted by skilled Indian craftsmen, murcia bags use the finest materials and hardware in their products. This stylishly silhouetted bag embodies the essence of the modern Indian woman - unapologetically fashionable. This bag with its laser cut leather-look upper with contrasting inner fabric adds a stylish spin to your off-duty ensembles. Inspired by retro-esque sequin detailing, expand your bag collection with this accessory. Height: 34cmWidth: 39cmDepth: expandable with zip to 6cmLeatherette upper with patterned cut outs on the front, over a sequined blue liningMetal ring detailing on the sidesOne strapOne main compartment with a zippered pocket and a pouchZippered pocket on the backBag careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust
